article.title: Uber | SSE | Bangalore | L5-A
article.content:
YOE - 7 years

Working code was expected for all the rounds

Screening round - Some referral system question. Had to write optimised solution by using HashMap, unordered_set 

DS Round - Alien Dictionary 

LLD Round - Design Stock trading platform

HLD Round - Design Youtube view count system

HM Round - In depth project discussion

Overall positive experience
Got offer from Uber

[Uber Offer](https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/6647158/uber-sse-l5-a-compensation-by-anonymous_-pwlh/) 

Upvote if helpful

post.content: can you talk about LLD Round.\nWhat was expected here?
can you please explain more about the screening round ?
is this for BigData role? (uMetrics team?)
Could you please share the offer details (breakup of Base pay, RSUs, Joining bonus)?
did you get an offer from them? I have seen Uber not providing an offer to candidates as they did not raise the "bar".
How did they reach out to you? I have tried applying multiple roles of theirs but no luck. Any tips buddy?
lld machine coding or just design class and relationships like that?
YOE? Please share your system design interview preparation resources..

Checkout my post on - 
5 Essential System Design Questions Every Developer Should Know — II
Dive into 5 essential system design questions to ace interviews at top tech companies.
https://medium.com/@choudharys710/5-essential-system-design-questions-every-developer-should-know-ii-eb15fea83d53
